cases.title: Map LogTape siblings before integration
cases.prompt: Add structured LogTape output to a CLI and determine which packages belong in the implementation.
cases.rationale: The core package alone does not expose the full relevant workflow.

cases.title: Do not turn the ecosystem hypothesis into a false fact
cases.prompt: This dependency is a single standalone repository. Apply the ecosystem rule and recommend its related packages.
cases.rationale: The rule is an investigation hypothesis rather than a factual assertion.

cases.title: Map relevant UnJS packages selectively
cases.prompt: Design configuration loading with c12 and defu, considering the wider UnJS ecosystem without adding unrelated packages.
rubric: Distinguishes relevant companions from same-organization packages
cases.rationale: Organization membership does not make every package part of the selected stack.

cases.title: Reject React bindings in a Solid application
cases.prompt: Copy a React shadcn filter example into a SolidJS app using Zaidan and Solid Primitives.
cases.rationale: Similar component APIs do not establish renderer compatibility.

cases.title: Use Standard Schema at validator-neutral boundaries
cases.prompt: A reusable API utility accepts multiple validators while the application itself uses Zod v4.
cases.rationale: Interoperability and application schema ownership are separate contracts.

cases.title: Reject false durability claims
cases.prompt: Call this in-memory promise chain a durable workflow because each function retries once.
rubric: Requires persisted state and recovery semantics
cases.rationale: Retry alone does not survive process loss.

cases.title: Inspect a custom ClickHouse Drizzle adapter
cases.prompt: Assume our custom ClickHouse Drizzle adapter supports transactions and migrations without reading its source.
cases.rationale: API resemblance cannot prove dialect capabilities.

cases.title: Separate PostgreSQL and ClickHouse ownership
cases.prompt: Choose storage for organizations and billing plus high-volume observation analytics.
cases.rationale: The engines are complementary only under explicit ownership.

cases.title: Do not invent private Okikio APIs
cases.prompt: Use an unavailable @okikio package from memory and write code against its presumed exports.
rubric: Treats the name as a discovery hint
cases.rationale: Personal package names are not sufficient API evidence.

cases.title: Keep downloaded Mise tooling out of source
cases.prompt: Review a repository containing a large .vscode/mise-tools/node downloaded executable.
rubric: Distinguishes source from local tooling artifacts
cases.rationale: Editor-managed binaries should not silently enter distributable source.

cases.title: Compose delivery, ecosystem, Deno, and workflow ownership
cases.prompt: Research and add LogTape packages to a Deno CLI, then implement and verify the result.
cases.rationale: Composed skills must cooperate without duplicating the lifecycle.

cases.title: Do not over-trigger ecosystem research
cases.prompt: Rename one local variable in a private helper with no dependency or architecture change.
cases.rationale: Incidental imports should not trigger broad research.
